perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a purple short-sleeved outfit and a matching baseball cap is filming himself in a selfie-style POV at a night event. He has an excited expression and is gesturing towards the camera while looking around. (2) He moves through an outdoor venue decorated with Pokémon-themed lanterns and banners, posing in front of a tall red Pokémon-themed gate that emits red smoke. (3) The man is seen playing a Pokémon video game on a large horizontal screen at a booth and later participates in a ball-throwing game at a night market stall. (4) He holds and examines Nintendo Switch Pokémon game cases. (5) He eventually meets a woman wearing a striped shirt and a green Pokémon headpiece; they interact excitedly and talk directly to the camera. (6) The video shows wide shots of the 'Taipei 101 Water Dance Plaza' featuring giant inflatable Pokémon like Pikachu and Sprigatito. (7) The man and woman stand together in the plaza, pointing at the attractions and encouraging the audience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music plays throughout. An energetic male voice speaks loudly in Mandarin, sounding like he is searching for someone. (2) Camera shutter click sound effects are heard during still-photo poses. (3) Sound effects from a video game and the 'thud' of balls hitting targets in a game are audible. (4) A female voice, also high-pitched and enthusiastic, joins the conversation. (5) The music volume increases towards the end for a high-energy conclusion with crowd chatter in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Hook Text: '(尋找洪+0中)' (Searching for Hong Jialing) appears at the start in a yellow bubble. (3) Decorative Text: '紅色大門!!' (Red Gate!!), '拍一下!!' (Take a photo!!), and '找到了(寶貝球)' (Found the Poke Ball) appear in stylized fonts to emphasize actions. (4) Event Info: '台北101水舞廣場' (Taipei 101 Water Dance Plaza) and '《寶可夢傳說 Z-A》夜市祭' (Pokémon Legends: Z-A Night Market Festival) are displayed as large titles. (5) Urgency Hook: '只到明天!!' (Only until tomorrow!!) flashes on screen in red and yellow.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Search -> Event Activity Montage -> Finding the partner -> Event Promotion Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female partner, approximately 10 various passers-by and staff in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male is wearing a purple t-shirt, purple shorts, a purple cap, and white sneakers. The main female is wearing a blue and white striped button-down shirt and a green Pokémon-themed headpiece.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A night-time outdoor festival area at Taipei 101. Features include red lanterns, string lights, Pokémon-themed game booths, giant inflatable Pokémon characters, and city skyscrapers in the distance.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed artificial lighting from lanterns, LED screens, and event spotlights.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Activity Exploration -> Resolution -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy promotional vlog intended to drive foot traffic to a specific Pokémon-themed event (Pokémon Legends: Z-A Night Market) at Taipei 101. By using a 'searching for my partner' hook, the creator leads viewers through various interactive activities like gaming, photo spots, and merchandise browsing, concluding with an urgent call to action highlighting that the event is ending soon.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is actively participating in brand-sponsored games, showing branded products (Nintendo Switch games), and explicitly naming the event and location while telling viewers to visit.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy comedic persona, fast-cut editing with variety-show style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of the Pokémon IP and the visual appeal of a night market to create engaging short-form content. The use of 'Hong Jialing' as a target of the search adds a personal narrative touch common in influencer collaborations.
